data.raceComments: {"comment":"4. VIEWPOINT is a very progressive gelding resuming, and he ended his initial 3 start prep with a dominant win over 1600m here last December. He will be spot on after a couple of solid trials, and having Nash Rawiller in the saddle is a very strong lead fresh for a Tuesday provincial meeting. On top for us. 7. WISHFUL THINKER followed up his game run for second on a heavy track, with a tenacious on-pace Maiden win over 1350m at Wyong 17 days ago. He takes another step up in class here, but he has the scope to measure up again. 2. PICK UP THE TAB has not had much luck with his barrier draws this prep, and that trend continues with another nasty gate here. He is down in class, and an extra 200m could make all the difference. A form reversal would be no surprise. Each way value.","runners":[4,7,2],"exclusive":true}
